type_definitions.name: SpecElementId
type_definitions.description: Validated newtype for spec.json element identifiers (e.g. IN-\d+, AC-\d+, CO-\d+). Constructor enforces non-empty + ID naming rules so downstream codec / verify / signal paths do not pass bare `String`. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1 under `libs/domain/src/plan_ref/spec_ref.rs` to make each spec requirement uniquely addressable for SpecRef.anchor resolution.

type_definitions.name: AdrAnchor
type_definitions.description: Validated newtype for ADR in-document anchors (heading slug / section marker). Constructor applies loose validation (non-empty) only; strict anchor semantics (heading slug vs HTML marker) are deferred to Q15. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1 under `libs/domain/src/plan_ref/adr_ref.rs`.

type_definitions.name: ConventionAnchor
type_definitions.description: Validated newtype for convention in-document anchors, symmetric to AdrAnchor. Constructor applies loose validation (non-empty) only; strict semantics deferred to Q15. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1 under `libs/domain/src/plan_ref/convention_ref.rs`.

type_definitions.name: ContentHash
type_definitions.description: Validated newtype for SHA-256 content hashes. Internally stores a normalized 32-byte buffer (`[u8; 32]`); the constructor accepts both a raw 32-byte slice and a 64-character lowercase hex string but always stores the canonical byte form. Used by SpecRef to pin a spec element's canonical JSON subtree. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1 under `libs/domain/src/plan_ref/spec_ref.rs`.

type_definitions.name: InformalGroundKind
type_definitions.description: Finite enum classifying the source of an unpersisted ground (Discussion / Feedback / Memory / UserDirective). Enum-first per .claude/rules/04-coding-principles.md — no transitions, fixed variant set. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1 under `libs/domain/src/plan_ref/informal_ground_ref.rs`; drives 🟡 signal evaluation (D3.1 / D3.2).

type_definitions.name: InformalGroundSummary
type_definitions.description: Validated newtype for one-line summaries of an unpersisted ground. Constructor enforces non-empty. Paired with InformalGroundKind inside InformalGroundRef. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1 under `libs/domain/src/plan_ref/informal_ground_ref.rs`.

type_definitions.name: AdrRef
type_definitions.description: Structured reference to an ADR section. Fields: `file: PathBuf`, `anchor: AdrAnchor`. Independent struct (no shared trait / discriminated union per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1); the containing field name determines reference direction. Used in spec.json `adr_refs[]` only. Type catalogue → ADR direct references are forbidden per ADR D1.5 (catalogue must reference spec, not ADR directly).

type_definitions.name: ConventionRef
type_definitions.description: Structured reference to a convention document section. Fields: `file: PathBuf`, `anchor: ConventionAnchor`. Independent struct, symmetric to AdrRef. Used in spec.json `convention_refs[]` and top-level `related_conventions[]`. Type catalogue → convention references are allowed in principle but the `convention_refs[]` field on catalogue entries is intentionally deferred to Q8 / a follow-up ADR (ADR D1.5); this struct is NOT used in type catalogue entries under the current ADR scope. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1.

type_definitions.name: SpecRef
type_definitions.description: Structured reference to a spec.json element. Fields: `file: PathBuf`, `anchor: SpecElementId`, `hash: ContentHash`. Anchor pins the target element; hash pins its canonical JSON subtree for staleness detection. Used in type catalogue entries' `spec_refs[]` to realise SoT Chain ②. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.1.

type_definitions.name: InformalGroundRef
type_definitions.description: Structured reference to an unpersisted ground (discussion / feedback / memory / user directive). Fields: `kind: InformalGroundKind`, `summary: InformalGroundSummary`. No file path — the ground is not yet persisted. Non-empty `informal_grounds[]` → 🟡 (per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D3.1 / §D3.2); must be promoted to a formal ref before merge.

type_definitions.name: ImplPlanDocument
type_definitions.description: Aggregate root for `track/items/<id>/impl-plan.json`. Fields: `schema_version`, `tasks: Vec<TrackTask>`, `plan: PlanView`. Created in Phase 3 (planner) and read by the merge-gate task-completion check. Replaces the tasks / plan portion historically embedded in metadata.json. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4.

type_definitions.name: TaskCoverageDocument
type_definitions.description: Aggregate root for `track/items/<id>/task-coverage.json`. Holds per-section (in_scope / out_of_scope / constraints / acceptance_criteria) mappings from SpecElementId to `Vec<TaskId>`, extracted from the previous `spec.acceptance_criteria[].task_refs` location. Verified by the `sotp verify plan-artifact-refs` CLI. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4.

type_definitions.name: SpecDocument
type_definitions.description: Aggregate root for spec.json. Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.2: remove `status` / `approved_at` / `content_hash` fields; each requirement (goal / scope / constraints / acceptance_criteria) gains a required `id: SpecElementId`; the previous `sources: Vec<String>` is split into `adr_refs: Vec<AdrRef>` + `convention_refs: Vec<ConventionRef>` + `informal_grounds: Vec<InformalGroundRef>`; `task_refs[]` is removed (moves to task-coverage.json); top-level `related_conventions` becomes `Vec<ConventionRef>`. HearingRecord history is retained.

type_definitions.name: SpecRequirement
type_definitions.description: Single requirement item used in goal / scope / constraints / acceptance_criteria (all four spec sections share this struct per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.2). Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.2 / §D2.1: add required `id: SpecElementId`; split `sources: Vec<String>` into `adr_refs: Vec<AdrRef>` + `convention_refs: Vec<ConventionRef>` + `informal_grounds: Vec<InformalGroundRef>`; remove `task_refs: Vec<TaskId>` (moves to task-coverage.json).

type_definitions.name: SpecValidationError
type_definitions.description: Validation error enum for spec / catalogue value objects. Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.2 / §D3: `ApprovalMetadataMissing` variant is removed (approved gate is eliminated). New variants may be added by the implementer to surface SpecElementId / ref / anchor validation failures.

type_definitions.name: ValidationError
type_definitions.description: Shared domain validation error enum. Modified by T002: add six new variants surfacing the plan_ref module's validation failures (InvalidSpecElementId, EmptyAdrAnchor, EmptyConventionAnchor, InvalidContentHash, EmptyInformalGroundSummary, MultiLineInformalGroundSummary). Pre-existing variants (TrackId / TaskId / CommitHash / etc.) are preserved.

type_definitions.name: TrackMetadata
type_definitions.description: Track identity aggregate in `libs/domain/src/track.rs`. Reduced to identity-only per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4: `tasks: Vec<TrackTask>` and `plan: PlanView` fields move to the new ImplPlanDocument. Retained fields per ADR D1.4 §metadata.json: `id`, `branch`, `title`, and `status` (now stored explicitly rather than task-derived, updated on status transitions). `status_override` from the current implementation is absorbed into the explicit `status` field per the ADR's simplified field list (`schema_version, id, branch, title, status, created_at, updated_at`); the implementer determines whether to keep `status_override` as a sub-mechanism or merge it into a single stored status. Timestamps (`created_at`, `updated_at`) are handled at the DTO layer (DocumentMeta). `PlanView` / `PlanSection` remain in domain and are reused by ImplPlanDocument.

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueEntry
type_definitions.description: Single entry in a `<layer>-types.json` catalogue (libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue.rs). Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.3 / §D2.1: add `spec_refs: Vec<SpecRef>` (SoT Chain ② reference to spec elements) and `informal_grounds: Vec<InformalGroundRef>` (unpersisted ground citations; non-empty → 🟡 advisory). `convention_refs[]` on catalogue entries is intentionally deferred to Q8 / a follow-up ADR (D1.5 table).

type_definitions.name: SpecStatus
type_definitions.description: Legacy two-variant enum (Draft / Approved) that gated spec approval. Deleted per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.2 / §D3 together with `cargo make spec-approve` (T009). All downstream reliance on approved-status transitions is replaced by signal-based gating (spec → ADR signal in D3.1).

type_definitions.name: CoverageResult
type_definitions.description: Legacy domain value object returned by `SpecDocument::evaluate_coverage()` / `validate_all_task_refs`. Deleted per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.3 / T012: requirement-to-task coverage now lives in `task-coverage.json` and is verified exclusively by the new `sotp verify plan-artifact-refs` CLI, which emits `VerifyFinding`s rather than a structured CoverageResult. Unused in domain after the migration.
